title: Spoilerific silliness
wikitext:

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Thu Apr 25, 2013 8:42 pm Oh sweet Jesus, I'm laughing so hard it hurts. I couldn't come up with anything that good, all I made was this Image Macro: SPOILER: Show

The two pylon-esque parts that stick out at the front kind of resemble huge Eva shoulder restraints.
